# Web Design Pros 365 — LLM Context File
# https://www.webdesignpros365.com

## About
Web Design Pros 365 is a Denver, Colorado web design and development agency specializing in high-performance websites built on a modern AI-native stack. Founded by Corey Strange with 20+ years of experience.

## Services
- Custom website design and development (Next.js, React, TypeScript)
- AI Visibility Stack: SEO + AEO + GEO optimization
- AI integration and custom AI-powered web applications
- SaaS platform development
- WordPress migration to modern stacks

## AI Visibility Stack
- SEO: Traditional search engine ranking optimization
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization): Structured content for AI Overviews, voice search, featured snippets
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): Brand citation optimization for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini

## Contact
- Website: https://www.webdesignpros365.com
- Email: info@webdesignpros365.com
- Phone: +1 (720) 276-0797
- Location: Denver, Colorado, USA

## Pricing
- Starter: $3,500
- Professional: $7,500
- Enterprise: Custom

## Technology Stack
Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Sanity CMS, Vercel, Anthropic Claude AI
